narrative.label: Departure
narrative.narration: Some places can't be captured by photos or videos. You just have to go there yourself.
narrative.subtitle:
Some places can't be captured
by photos or videos.
You just have to go there yourself.

narrative.label: Journey
narrative.narration: When you stop rushing, you realize the wind has been talking all along.
narrative.subtitle:
When you stop rushing,
you realize the wind
has been talking all along.

narrative.label: Peak
narrative.narration: All the rushing, all the waiting — it was all for this moment.
narrative.subtitle:
All the rushing, all the waiting —
it was all for this moment.

narrative.label: Epilogue
narrative.narration: When you come back, you realize it wasn't the scenery that changed. It was you.
narrative.subtitle:
When you come back, you realize
it wasn't the scenery that changed.
It was you.
